title: MCA areas of research interest
body: "Summary of the research and evidence that the Maritime Coastguard Agency (MCA) needs to complete with external researchers.  Reviewed every two years, the information is supplied to:   invite collaboration from interested parties provide transparency and clarity on future policy and regulatory development    Organisations and individuals wishing to discuss opportunities regarding research interests can contact: innovation@mcga.gov.uk or visit Maritime Innovation Hub for more information.  For further guidance on government ARIs and routes for academic engagement with government visit: areas of research interest.  "
